rag_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Place component type contracts in component type scopes
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
Use only valid component type features in type scope contracts
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
generic_rules: Insert annex blocks at the appropriate scope level
Maintain existing architecture while adding contracts
Use only visible identifiers in contracts
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when adding bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate scope
Use valid AGREE syntax for declarations and expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
